name: netdust-wp
description: Netdust WordPress plugin — WP discipline (security, database, bedrock-composer), WP reference (frontend, testing, infra), ntdst-core framework (architecture, data, patterns, yootheme), and WP commands (/wp-new-project, /scaffold-plugin, /sync-db, /setup-tests). Layers on top of netdust-core for memory, hooks, dev-stack, server management, code review, cross-domain skills, and /deploy.
